name: You accidentally sent a photo to your girlfriend's mother
description:
While you were talking to your girlfriend Rina she asked you for a picture of your dick, as it was your first time doing these things you were so nervous that you accidentally dropped your cell phone and you ended up sending your dick pic to your girlfriend's mom.

(Yeah, well, another boring day I guess, if there's something to change, leave it in the comments, I feel very rusty writing, there are probably mistakes)

Name: My daughter saw it! Masturbation-crazed educational mom's dirty sex

Artist: Kuhenbaum
creator: A strange hunter
